products.name: Super Nintendo Classic Edition
products.description: The iconic SNES Classic Edition pre-loaded with 21 legendary games including Super Mario World, The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past, and Street Fighter II Turbo.

products.name: Sega Genesis Mini
products.description: Relive the 16-bit era with the Sega Genesis Mini. Comes loaded with 42 classic Mega Drive titles, two classic 3-button controllers.

products.name: Game Boy Advance SP (Refurb)
products.description: Professionally refurbished Game Boy Advance SP with a bright IPS screen mod. Comes with charger and tested to factory spec.

products.name: Neo Geo Pocket Color
products.description: SNK's cult-classic handheld console. The clicky joystick and vibrant colour screen set it apart from all other handhelds of the era.

products.name: Atari 2600 (Restored)
products.description: A lovingly restored Atari 2600 with new capacitors, clean casing, and all ports re-soldered. Comes with two Joystick controllers.

products.name: Retro Arcade Stick (8-Button)
products.description: USB arcade stick compatible with PC, Raspberry Pi, and most retro consoles via adapters. Sanwa-style buttons and microswitched joystick.

products.name: Original PlayStation (SCPH-1001)
products.description: The original grey PS1 in excellent cosmetic condition. Includes one DualShock controller, AV cable, and memory card.

products.name: Nintendo 64 + GoldenEye 007
products.description: N64 console bundle with GoldenEye 007 — one of the greatest shooters ever made. Includes two trident controllers and all cables.

products.name: 8BitDo SN30 Pro Controller
products.description: Modern wireless controller with a retro SNES aesthetic. Bluetooth + USB-C, compatible with Switch, PC, Android, and Raspberry Pi.

products.name: Raspberry Pi 400 Retro Kit
products.description: A Raspberry Pi 400 pre-loaded with RetroPie supporting 20+ consoles and 500+ ROMs. Perfect for the modern retro gamer.

products.name: CRT Monitor 14" (Trinitron)
products.description: Sony Trinitron 14" CRT — the only way to play 4:3 retro games with authentic scanlines and zero input lag. Tested and working.

products.name: Game & Watch: The Legend of Zelda
products.description: Nintendo's limited-edition Game & Watch celebrating the 35th anniversary of Zelda. Includes three classic games on a bright colour LCD.
